data.title: 国际服学生介绍：偶像阿露、优香、爱丽丝、日富美
data.summary: [Student Intro - Aru] Aru's stylin' idol outfit, pero! The leader of Mischievous☆Straight and creato
data.body:
[Student Intro - Aru]

Aru's stylin' idol outfit, pero!
The leader of Mischievous☆Straight and creator of the prank!
Pero work!

Y'all didn't forget she called me "that bird thing" though, did ya? Pero! 

#BlueArchive
#AprilFools![Y6SkUCj0hFSMQAo3EzQ4OxjuSLxbT7EN.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Y6SkUCj0hFSMQAo3EzQ4OxjuSLxbT7EN.jpg)

[Student Intro - Yuuka]

Serious Yuuka appears in idol form, pero!
Can ya believe she's only here 'cause Noa made her? 

Y'all already know she worked hardest during dance and vocal practice though! 

#BlueArchive
#AprilFools![D8VXeQ4bvkcEcygeQccObNWuQl8WZIeB.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/D8VXeQ4bvkcEcygeQccObNWuQl8WZIeB.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hifumi]

And my best friend Hifumi, pero!
Now I getta be her number 1 fan!

Hifumi called, and I answered! 
Didja see me flyin' in the sky, pero?! 
Let's play together more, peroro!

#BlueArchive
#AprilFools![iMXJU27TuVoALVDFiC7Ncgvh49yopxTD.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/iMXJU27TuVoALVDFiC7Ncgvh49yopxTD.jpg)

[Student Intro - Aris]

And the cutest of them all, Aris!
...Did she just say somethin' 'bout a game, pero? 

Don't tell no one, but she worked hard whisperin', "I will use a Charm Spell on Sensei!"
Eek!

#BlueArchive
#AprilFools![XY1MagDuoPtlTz3lJhobLJIcp0pMfudD.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/XY1MagDuoPtlTz3lJhobLJIcp0pMfudD.jpg)
